---
title: "Kuntavaalit 2025"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      light: [litera, custom.scss]
      dark: [darkly, custom.scss]
    scrolling: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:teromeh@proton.me
      - icon: house-door
        href: ../
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(jsonlite)

data <- readRDS("election-data-2025.rds")
elected <- readRDS("elected.rds")
map_source <- readRDS("election-data-2025-municipalities.rds")
kunta_geo <- fromJSON("kuntarajat.geojson", simplifyVector = FALSE)

party_colors <- c(
  "SDP" = "#F54B4B",
  "KOK" = "#003A54",
  "KESK" = "#3BAD2E",
  "VIHR" = "#76B72A",
  "VAS" = "#F00A64",
  "PS" = "#002395",
  "RKP" = "#ffdc5d",
  "KD" = "#118DFF",
  "LIIK" = "#cf83c8",
  "Muut" = "#000000"
)

title_font <- list(family = "Outfit, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a")

party_data <- data |>
  group_by(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi) |>
  summarise(total_votes = sum(aanet_yhteensa_lkm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(percentage = (total_votes / sum(total_votes)) * 100) |>
  slice_max(total_votes, n = 10) |>
  mutate(
    label = paste0(format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %"),
    party_bold = paste0("<b>", puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, "</b>")
  )

map_data <- map_source |>
  group_by(kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi) |>
  summarise(aanet = sum(aanet_yhteensa_lkm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi) |>
  slice_max(aanet, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()

# Municipalities won by a party outside the main party_colors list (e.g. local
# lists) keep their own unique name for the hover text, but are still filled
# black like the rest, matching the original "Muut" color.
map_data <- map_data |>
  mutate(map_color = ifelse(
    puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi %in% names(party_colors),
    unname(party_colors[puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi]),
    "#000000"
  ))

map_color_order <- unique(map_data$map_color)
map_n_colors <- length(map_color_order)

map_data <- map_data |>
  mutate(color_index = match(map_color, map_color_order) - 1)

map_colorscale <- do.call(c, lapply(seq_len(map_n_colors), function(i) {
  col <- map_color_order[i]
  list(
    list((i - 1) / map_n_colors, col),
    list(i / map_n_colors, col)
  )
}))

age_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  count(ika_vaalipaivana, name = "maara")

age_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  count(ika_vaalipaivana, name = "maara")

gender_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, sukupuoli) |>
  count(sukupuoli, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(
    total = sum(maara),
    percentage = (maara / total) * 100,
    label = paste0(format(maara, big.mark = " "), " (",
                   format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %)")
  )

gender_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, sukupuoli) |>
  count(sukupuoli, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(
    total = sum(maara),
    percentage = (maara / total) * 100,
    label = paste0(format(maara, big.mark = " "), " (",
                   format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %)")
  )

occupation_all <- data |>
  mutate(ammatti = trimws(ammatti)) |>
  filter(!is.na(ammatti), ammatti != "") |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, ammatti) |>
  count(ammatti, name = "maara") |>
  arrange(desc(maara)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(label = format(maara, big.mark = " "))

occupation_elected <- elected |>
  mutate(ammatti = trimws(ammatti)) |>
  filter(!is.na(ammatti), ammatti != "") |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, ammatti) |>
  count(ammatti, name = "maara") |>
  arrange(desc(maara)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(label = format(maara, big.mark = " "))

avg_age_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  summarise(avg = round(mean(ika_vaalipaivana, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) |>
  pull(avg)

avg_age_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  summarise(avg = round(mean(ika_vaalipaivana, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) |>
  pull(avg)
```



## Row {height="550px"}

### Column

```{r}
#| label: party-chart
plot_ly(party_data,
        x = ~percentage,
        y = ~reorder(party_bold, percentage),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        color = ~puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi,
        colors = party_colors,
        hovertext = ~paste0(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, ": ",
                    format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %",
                    "<br>Ääniä yhteensä: ", 
                    format(total_votes, big.mark = " ")),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Äänijakauma - Puolueet</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", 
                  family = "Inter, sans-serif",
                  size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", 
             range = c(0, max(party_data$percentage) * 1.3),
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             showticklabels = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "",
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             ticklabelposition = "outside",
             ticklen = 10,
             tickcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
             tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 14, 
                             family = "Inter, sans-serif"),
             fixedrange = TRUE
             ),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(party_data), function(i) {
      list(
        x = party_data$percentage[i],
        y = party_data$party_bold[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", party_data$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13, 
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      ) 
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: party-map
plot_ly(
  map_data,
  type = "choropleth",
  geojson = kunta_geo,
  locations = ~kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi,
  featureidkey = "properties.NAMEFIN",
  z = ~color_index,
  zmin = 0, zmax = map_n_colors,
  colorscale = map_colorscale,
  marker = list(line = list(color = "white", width = 0.4)),
  hovertext = ~paste0("<b>", kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, "</b><br>",
                       puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, ": ",
                       format(aanet, big.mark = " "), " ääntä"),
  hoverinfo = "text",
  showscale = FALSE
) |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Suurin puolue kunnittain</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    geo = list(
      visible = FALSE,
      fitbounds = "locations",
      projection = list(type = "mercator"),
      bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
    ),
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    margin = list(t = 40, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: age-all
plot_ly(age_all,
        x = ~ika_vaalipaivana,
        y = ~maara,
        type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#004677"),
        hovertext = ~paste0("Ikä: ", ika_vaalipaivana, " vuotta<br>",
                            "Ehdokkaita: ", maara),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Ikäjakauma - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "Ikä", 
                 showgrid = FALSE, 
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), 
                 dtick = 10, 
                 fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "Ehdokkaiden määrä", 
                 showgrid = FALSE, 
                 showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE, 
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), 
                 fixedrange = TRUE), 
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    annotations = list(
      list(
        x = max(age_all$ika_vaalipaivana),
        y = max(age_all$maara),
        text = paste0("Keskiarvo: <b>", format(avg_age_all, decimal.mark = ","), "</b> vuotta"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "right",
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 12,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    )
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: age-elected
plot_ly(age_elected,
        x = ~ika_vaalipaivana,
        y = ~maara,
        type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#C0392B"),
        hovertext = ~paste0("Ikä: ", ika_vaalipaivana, " vuotta<br>",
                            "Valittuja: ", maara),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Ikäjakauma - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "Ikä", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), dtick = 10, fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "Valittujen määrä", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE, tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), fixedrange = TRUE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    annotations = list(
      list(
        x = max(age_elected$ika_vaalipaivana),
        y = max(age_elected$maara),
        text = paste0("Keskiarvo: <b>", format(avg_age_elected, decimal.mark = ","), "</b> vuotta"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "right",
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 12,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    )
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: occupation-all
plot_ly(occupation_all,
        x = ~maara,
        y = ~reorder(ammatti, maara),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = "#004677"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(ammatti, ": ", format(maara, big.mark = " "), " ehdokasta"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Yleisimmät ammatit - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 ticklabelposition = "outside",
                 ticklen = 10,
                 tickcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                 tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                                 family = "Inter, sans-serif"),
                 fixedrange = TRUE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(occupation_all), function(i) {
      list(
        x = occupation_all$maara[i],
        y = occupation_all$ammatti[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", occupation_all$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: occupation-elected
plot_ly(occupation_elected,
        x = ~maara,
        y = ~reorder(ammatti, maara),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = "#C0392B"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(ammatti, ": ", format(maara, big.mark = " "), " valittua"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Yleisimmät ammatit - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 ticklabelposition = "outside",
                 ticklen = 10,
                 tickcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                 tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                                 family = "Inter, sans-serif"),
                 fixedrange = TRUE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(occupation_elected), function(i) {
      list(
        x = occupation_elected$maara[i],
        y = occupation_elected$ammatti[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", occupation_elected$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
## Row {height="180px"}

### Column

```{r}
#| label: gender-all
plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_all |> filter(sukupuoli == "Mies"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#3B6E8F"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Miehet: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_all |> filter(sukupuoli == "Nainen"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#E8A93D"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Naiset: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    title = list(text = "<b>Sukupuolijakauma - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>",
                 font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showticklabels = FALSE, range = c(0, 100), fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: gender-elected
plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_elected |> filter(sukupuoli == "Mies"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#3B6E8F"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Miehet: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_elected |> filter(sukupuoli == "Nainen"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#E8A93D"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Naiset: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    title = list(text = "<b>Sukupuolijakauma - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>",
                 font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showticklabels = FALSE, range = c(0, 100), fixedrange = TRUE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

```{r}
#| label: footer
#| output: asis
cat('<p style="font-size: 12px; color: #555555; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; text-align: right; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;">
Data: <a href="https://tulospalvelu.vaalit.fi/fi/index.html" target="_blank" style="color: #555555; text-decoration: underline;">Oikeusministeriö, Tieto- ja tulospalvelu</a> ·
Kuntarajat: <a href="https://github.com/samilaine/hallinnollisetrajat" target="_blank" style="color: #555555; text-decoration: underline;">Maanmittauslaitos (CC BY 4.0)</a>
</p>')
```
